reviews.review_description: OK for six dollars this game is pretty good even though it might be a little low quality and probably not the best game they’ve made, but it’s still pretty good and I’d recommend playing it ￼￼￼
I bought the game and at first I did not no what to do the I picked up the iPad in the game ￼ and I just have to guess if they wash their hands and stuff like that like how would I know that? ￼

This game does not have a clear tutorial to instruct players on how to play the game. Through my practice, I found that the way to play this game is to play the role of a greedy boss, squeeze employees, and then use the money obtained to buy various props and skins, and use these props to interact with NPCs. I like the AK47 in it very much. It feels very good and can interact with NPCs. I also like the free water gun. The current version can only be used in the office. If the mobile mechanism is well developed, you can go on adventures outside and use various props. It should be very interesting. This is a very ambitious development team. I look forward to more interesting updates.
